content: Remote OK Business Analyst Contact Government Services, LLC <p><span style="font-size: 16px">Business Analyst</span></p><p>Employment Type: Full-Time, Experienced</p><p>Department: Information Technology </p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">CGS is looking for business analysts to work with a large federal agency!&nbsp;As a Business Analyst in Business operations and Content Strategy&nbsp;for CGS, you will partner with internal business owners and external partners to understand new business opportunities and define functional requirements.&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">CGS brings motivated, highly skilled, and creative people together to solve the governmentâs most dynamic problems with cutting-edge technology. To carry out our mission, we are seeking candidates who are excited to contribute to government innovation,&nbsp;appreciate collaboration, and can anticipate the needs of others. Here at CGS, we offer an environment in which our employees feel supported, and we encourage professional growth through various learning opportunities.</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">Skills and attributes for success:</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Support the development of briefings, agendas, and other general documentation support as directed, including training material and demonstration sessions for new and existing technologies to various stakeholders.</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Document and analyze business and functional requirements so that they may be accurately translated into process maps and technical system requirements</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Develop comprehensive documentation that meets organizational standards, to include but not limited to basic system architectural diagrams/wireframes, concepts of operations, monthly status reports</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Create high-level briefings and communications materials for customers, management, and executive stakeholders</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Work with the government and team members to identify, recommend, and implement opportunities for service delivery improvement and new technology implementation</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Evaluate program materials and develop innovative approaches for improvement</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Independently gather information from subject matter experts to develop, organize, and write procedure manuals, technical specifications, and process documentation</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Develop and implement a deep understanding of Microsoft and Atlassian products and services (Teams, SharePoint, Visio, Jira, Confluence) to translate complex product information into simple, polished, and engaging content</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Research, outline, write, and edit new and existing content, working closely with various team members to understand project requirements</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Develop content in various media forms for maximum usability, with a consistent and cohesive voice across all documentation</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Perform risk management, including identifying, prioritizing, and mitigating risks, and communicating and escalating risks and issues</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Support a continuous improvement process by providing recommendations on improving products, services, and processes.</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Manage client interaction and expectations regarding team efforts</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Identify and coordinate cross-team dependencies and collaboration</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Continually seek opportunities to increase customer satisfaction, develop and deepen long-lasting client relationships</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">Qualifications</span><b style="font-size: 12px">:</b></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Must be a U.S. Citizen</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Bachelor's Degree (Computer Science, or engineering)</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Must be able to successfully complete a stringent Background Investigation and obtain required Government Security clearance</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- 7+ years of experience in business analysis, systems analysis, and/or design of information systems programs and related business processes</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Experience working with phase-based and Agile delivery methods</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Experience with Jira or other Agile tools</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Ability to clearly communicate technical concepts to both technical and non-technical users.</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Must be able to work well both in a team environment and independently.</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Must possess exceptional attention to detail</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Familiarity with government projects and policy/procedures teams</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Demonstrates ability to interact comfortably with Senior Leadership and/or Government Executives and staff on a day-to-day basis</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Experience in managing client requirements and small teams</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Excellent analytical skills and business presentation skills</span></p><p><br></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">Ideally, you will also have:</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Experience supporting DHS HQ or other US Federal Agencies &nbsp;&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Experience tracking and reporting project or program delivery progress and &nbsp;budget execution</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Experience developing project briefs and reports for non-technical audiences&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Knowledge of the federal acquisition lifecycle</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px">- Familiarity with Business Intelligence and Data Analytics</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 12px&quo
